name: prs-review
description: Structured code review of one or more Pull Requests, Bitbucket and GitHub in the same batch. One subagent per PR (parallel, multi-repo) applies the sdd plugin's review doctrine — blind lenses plus adversarial verification — over the diff fetched via the matching MCP, and consolidates a single approved/rejected verdict with blockers, warnings and praise, written to a ClickUp-ready .txt.
